curatorNote:
Winds of Yawanawa is a groundbreaking collaborative AI project that pairs Anadol's data-painting practice with art and weather data from the Yawanawá community of the Brazilian Amazon. The work draws on the community's own visual traditions, and proceeds support cultural preservation programs.

Hivemind is the largest holder of the series, with a core focus on Flowers, Scorching and Freezing traits - considered the 'grails' of the collection.
essayTitle: Inside the Collection: Winds of Yawanawa
